paper_title: Mitochondrial Analysis of the Most Basal Canid Reveals Deep Divergence between Eastern and Western North American Gray Foxes (Urocyon spp.) and Ancient Roots in Pleistocene California

methods.description: Process for extracting DNA from various sample types and amplifying specific mitochondrial regions for analysis.

steps.description: Extracted DNA using Qiagen DNeasy blood and tissue kits for blood and tissue samples and QIAamp DNA stool kits for scats, following manufacturer's protocols.
steps.searchable_summary: extract DNA from blood, tissue, and scat samples using Qiagen kits

steps.description: For hair extractions, digested the follicles overnight, followed by DNA purification using phenol/chloroform, and cleaned up using Amicon Ultra centrifuge filters.
steps.searchable_summary: purify DNA from hair follicles using phenol/chloroform and Amicon filters

steps.description: Performed polymerase chain reaction (PCR) to amplify a 441 bp portion of mitochondrial cytochrome b using specific primers.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify mitochondrial cytochrome b using PCR

steps.description: Performed PCR to amplify a portion of D loop using specific primers and thermoprofile.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify D loop region using PCR

steps.description: Sequenced fragments in both directions for D loop and only in the forward direction for cytochrome b.
steps.searchable_summary: sequence DNA fragments for D loop and cytochrome b

methods.description: Procedures for constructing phylogenetic trees and analyzing genetic diversity and structure among gray fox populations.

steps.description: Constructed phylogenetic trees using maximum likelihood and Bayesian approaches with trees rooted to red fox and coyote outgroups.
steps.searchable_summary: construct phylogenetic trees using maximum likelihood and Bayesian methods

steps.description: Estimated haplotype and nucleotide diversity using Arlequin 3.5.
Estimated divergence time using MCMC simulations in the program IMa2.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate divergence time using MCMC simulations

steps.description: Tested for population growth by calculating Fu's F S and comparing to a distribution from coalescent simulations.
steps.searchable_summary: test for population growth using Fu's F S

steps.description: Constructed a Bayesian skyline plot to estimate effective population size through time.
steps.searchable_summary: create Bayesian skyline plot for population size estimation

steps.description: Visualized relationships among haplotypes using a median-joining network.
steps.searchable_summary: create median-joining network for haplotype relationships

steps.description: Evaluated population structure using SAMOVA and Mantel tests.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze population structure using SAMOVA and Mantel tests
